# maczo Originals — Merchant Integration

> Provably-fair casino games offered through a seamless wallet aggregation. You call our launch API to
> open a game for a player, and you implement a seamless wallet we call to move money during play.
> Everything is JSON, signed with HMAC-SHA256 headers, integer minor units + currency + currency_exp.
> Sandbox base URL: https://originals-api-dev.maczo.co · Production base URL: https://originals-api.maczo.co
> Merchant portal: https://portal-dev.maczo.co (sandbox) / https://portal.maczo.co (production). Docs: https://docs.maczo.co

## Read these to integrate

- [Onboarding](https://docs.maczo.co/onboarding.html): sandbox to production, what you provide vs. what maczo provides, steps.
- [Integration wire contract](https://docs.maczo.co/maczo-native-wire.html): both call directions, HMAC header signing, money model, ordering guarantee, provably-fair.
- [OpenAPI specification (raw YAML)](https://docs.maczo.co/specs/maczo-native-seamless.v1.yaml): machine-readable schema of the seamless wallet you implement.

## One file for AI

- [Complete single-file reference](https://docs.maczo.co/llms-full.txt): everything above concatenated into one plain-text document — hand this URL to an AI to integrate in one shot.
